calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Trevor Rose appeared via zoom for and with William Ribeiro (executor).

Discussion held in regard to Mr. Ribiero being a executor and trustee, that there is no conflict of interest, that there are no objections, and that all beneficiaries are on board. Petition to terminate estate is taken under submission.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Saephan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Dec-07-1973 is admitted to probate. William H. Ribeiro is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
